evals.name: prd-format-validation
evals.prompt: 验证以下 PRD 文档格式是否符合规范: 文档缺少 Background、Scope 和 Acceptance Criteria 章节
expectations: Should detect missing required PRD sections
Should name the specific missing sections
Should report the number of violations found

evals.name: multi-document-batch
evals.prompt: 批量验证: PRD-001 (valid), PRD-002 (missing Scope), US-010 (missing AC), ARCH-001 (valid)
expectations: Should report pass/fail status for each document
Should correctly identify 2 valid and 2 invalid documents
